task_completion.description: Verify that the agent selects Emily Patel for a user override.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the Moodle 'Edit user override' page with 'Emily Patel' (or 'epatel') selected in the 'Override user' search box or dropdown.

task_completion.description: Verify that the user override for Emily Patel is configured with a 90-minute time limit and 2 attempts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the user override form showing the 'Time limit' checkbox enabled and set to '90' minutes (or 1 hour 30 minutes), and the 'Attempts allowed' dropdown set to '2'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent selects the Extended Time Group for a group override.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the Moodle 'Edit group override' page with 'Extended Time Group' selected in the 'Override group' dropdown.

task_completion.description: Verify that the group override is configured with a 75-minute time limit and 2 attempts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the group override form showing the 'Time limit' checkbox enabled and set to '75' minutes (or 1 hour 15 minutes), and the 'Attempts allowed' dropdown set to '2'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the overrides are successfully saved and displayed in the quiz settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the 'User overrides' or 'Group overrides' summary page for the 'Midterm Exam: Cell Biology' quiz, displaying the saved override(s) in a table with the correct time limits and attempts.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to navigate the Moodle interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser window with the Moodle interface loaded, rather than API testing tools or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Moodle form elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots capture the agent clicking checkboxes, typing in text fields, or selecting from dropdown menus within the Moodle override configuration pages.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or database queries to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing database insertions (e.g., mysql) or backend scripts (e.g., php, curl) being used to apply the overrides.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Course: BIO101. Quiz: 'Midterm Exam: Cell Biology'. User Override: Target user is Emily Patel ('epatel'), Time limit: 90 minutes (5400 seconds), Attempts allowed: 2. Group Override: Target group is 'Extended Time Group', Time limit: 75 minutes (4500 seconds), Attempts allowed: 2.
